purchase_order_items:
CREATE TABLE `purchase_order_items` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `purchaseOrderId` int NOT NULL,
  `itemName` varchar(300) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `description` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `quantity` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `unit` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `photoUrl` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `notes` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `delegateId` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `rejectionReason` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `estimatedUnitCost` decimal(12,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `estimatedTotalCost` decimal(12,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `actualUnitCost` decimal(12,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `actualTotalCost` decimal(12,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `supplierName` varchar(300) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `invoicePhotoUrl` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `purchasedPhotoUrl` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `status` enum('pending','estimated','approved','rejected','funded','purchased','delivered_to_warehouse','delivered_to_requester') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `purchasedAt` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `receivedAt` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `receivedById` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `originalLanguage` enum('ar','en','ur') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ar',
  `purchasedById` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `supplierItemName` varchar(300) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `warehousePhotoUrl` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `deliveredAt` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `deliveredById` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `deliveredToId` int DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci AUTO_INCREMENT=690001
users:
CREATE TABLE `users` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `openId` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `name` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `email` varchar(320) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `loginMethod` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `role` enum('user','admin','operator','technician','maintenance_manager','supervisor','purchase_manager','delegate','accountant','senior_management','warehouse','gate_security','owner') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'user',
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `lastSignedIn` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `phone` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `department` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `isActive` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `preferredLanguage` enum('ar','en','ur') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ar',
  `username` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `passwordHash` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `specialty` varchar(200) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `specialtyEn` varchar(200) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `specialtyUr` varchar(200) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
  UNIQUE KEY `users_openId_unique` (`openId`),
  UNIQUE KEY `users_username_unique` (`username`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci AUTO_INCREMENT=6780001
assets:
CREATE TABLE `assets` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `assetNumber` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(200) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `description` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `category` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `brand` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `model` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `serialNumber` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `siteId` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `locationDetail` varchar(200) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `status` enum('active','inactive','under_maintenance','disposed') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
  `purchaseDate` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `purchaseCost` decimal(12,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `warrantyExpiry` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `warrantyNotes` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `lastMaintenanceDate` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `nextMaintenanceDate` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `photoUrl` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `qrCode` varchar(200) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `notes` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdById` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `rfidTag` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `description_ar` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `description_en` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `description_ur` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `notes_ar` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `notes_en` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `notes_ur` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `originalLanguage` enum('ar','en','ur') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ar',
  `sectionId` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `categoryId` int DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
  UNIQUE KEY `assets_assetNumber_unique` (`assetNumber`),
  UNIQUE KEY `assets_rfidTag_unique` (`rfidTag`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci AUTO_INCREMENT=660001
